title: Amtech S1751 Lead Free Solder, Environmentally Friendly Soldering Wire with Storage Container
features: ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY: This general purpose solder is lead free and better for the environment
VERSATILE: Ideal for general purpose soldering jobs, it is supplied in handy storage container
DIMENSIONS: It has a diameter of 1mm and is approximately 190cm in length when fully extended
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: From the manufacturer General purpose solder 10gm lead-free alloy solder Contains 2.5% non-corrosive rosin flux Contains 96.82% tin and 0.68% copper Temperature range 232-283°C Supplied in storage container About us Amtech is a DK Tools brand and the company has been established for over 30 years. We started life as a family run market stall in London and now our know-how has been optimised across our vast range of tools for the home, garage and garden. We pride ourselves on assisting our customers with their do-it-yourself decision making process, because we are passionate about offering the right tools. Our business has been built over the years on the foundations of our 3 core company values, Honesty , Integrity and Trust .
